Spectral Data API

EchelleBase.SpectralData.SpecData — Type

An abstract type for all spectral data, both 2d echellograms and extracted 1d spectra, parametrized by the spectrograph symbol S.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.SpecData1d — Type

A SpecData1d.

Fields

  • fname::String The filename.
  • header::FITSHeader The fits header.
  • data::DataFrame A DataFrame containing the actual data.
EchelleBase.SpectralData.SpecData2d — Type

An abstract type for all 2d spectral data (echellograms), parametrized by the spectrograph symbol S.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.Echellogram — Type
Echellogram is an alias for SpecData2d.
EchelleBase.SpectralData.RawSpecData2d — Type

A RawSpecData2d.

Fields

  • fname::String The filename.
  • header::FITSHeader The fits header.
EchelleBase.SpectralData.MasterCal2d — Type

A MasterCal2d.

Fields

  • fname::String The filename.
  • group::Vector{SpecData2d{S}} The vector of individual SpecData objects used to generate this frame.
EchelleBase.SpectralData.get_spectrograph — Function
SpectralData.get_spectrograph(ensemble::IterativeSpectralRVEnsembleProblem)

Gets the spectrograph as a string for this ensemble.

get_spectrograph(data::SpecData{S})

Returns the name of the spectrograph as a string corresponding to this SpecData object.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.get_spec_module — Function
get_spec_module(data::SpecData{S})

Returns the module for this spectrograph.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.read_header — Function
read_header

Primary method to read in the fits header. Must be implemented.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.read_image — Function
read_image

Primary method to read in an image. Must be implemented.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.read_spec1d — Function
read_spec1d

Primary method to read in a reduced spectrum. Must be implemented.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.ordermin — Function
ordermin

Returns the minimum order on the detector for a given exposure.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.ordermax — Function
ordermax

Returns the maximum order on the detector for a given exposure.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.orderbottom — Function
orderbottom

Returns the bottom order on the detector for a given exposure. It is not necessary that orderbottom < ordertop. Must be implemented.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.ordertop — Function
ordertop

Returns the top order on the detector for a given exposure. Must be implemented.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.parse_exposure_start_time — Function
parse_exposure_start_time

Parses the exposure start time for a given exposure.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.parse_itime — Function
parse_itime

Parses the integration (exposure) time for a given exposure.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.parse_object — Function
parse_object

Parses the object name for a given exposure.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.parse_sky_coord — Function
parse_sky_coord

Parses the sky coordinate for a given exposure.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.parse_utdate — Function
parse_utdate

Parses the UT date for a given exposure.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.get_exposure_midpoint — Function
get_exposure_midpoint

Gets the exposure midpoint.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.get_barycentric_velocity — Function
get_barycentric_velocity

Gets the barycentric velocity correction.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.get_barycentric_corrections — Function
get_barycentric_corrections

Gets the barycentric Julian date and velocity correction.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.get_λsolution_estimate — Function
get_λsolution_estimate

Gets an estimate for the wavelength solution. The precision of the returned grid will be subject to the stability of the spectrograph.

EchelleBase.SpectralData.normalize! — Function
normalize!(data::SpecData1d; p=0.98)

Normalizes the spectral flux and flux error of a 1d spectrum to p.

EchelleBase.SpectralRegions.SpecRegion1d — Type

A container for 1d spectral regions for reduced spectra.

Fields

  • pixmin: The starting pixel.
  • pixmax: The ending pixel.
  • λmin: The starting wavelength.
  • λmax: The ending wavelength.
  • order: The echelle order number, if applicable.
  • label: The label for this chunk.
  • fiber: The fiber number, if applicable.
EchelleBase.SpectralRegions.SpecRegion2d — Type

A container for 2d spectral regions for echellograms.

Fields

  • pixmin: The starting pixel in the spectral direction.
  • pixmax: The ending pixel in the spectral direction.
  • orderbottom: The bottom order.
  • ordertop: The top order.
  • poly_bottom: The bottom bounding polynomial.
  • poly_top: The top bounding polynomial.
EchelleBase.mask! — Function
mask!(data::SpecData1d, sregion::SpecRegion1d)

Mask bad pixels in-place according to the variables data.data.λ, data.data.flux, data.data.fluxerr, data.data.mask, as well as the bounding pixels in sregion (not wavelength).

mask!(image::AbstractMatrix{<:Number}, sregion::SpecRegion2d)

Mask bad pixels in-place according to the bounding polynomials and left/right ends.
